methodology: Cross-reference network (ISA.40.31→HEB.12.1 = 27v, 2CO.5.7→HEB.11.1 = 43v strongest link, 1CO.9.24→HEB.12.1 = 22v athletic cluster) + patristic evidence (16 citations: Chrysostom on every key verse 'cloud=protective shade', Clement of Rome AD 99, Aquinas scholastic definition, Spurgeon 'saints observe from heaven') + CCEL commentaries (Calvin 'associates not rivals', Barnes 'Homer cloud metaphor', JFB dual interpretation, Henry, Wesley Rev4:4 link) + topics (CLOUDS, FAITH, RACE, PATIENCE, PERSEVERANCE)

evidence: Catena Bible (4 comments: Chrysostom 'cloud=shade that relieves suffering', Clement of Rome AD 99)
CCEL (Calvin 'associates not rivals', Barnes 'Homer metaphor', JFB dual, Spurgeon 'saints observe')
topics (CLOUDS 'multitudes of persons', RACE, PATIENCE, PERSEVERANCE)
Catena Bible (8 comments! Chrysostom 'faith IS the substance', Aquinas scholastic definition — largest entry)
Catena Bible (3 comments: Chrysostom 'who encourages others SPEAKS' — Abel IS a witness)
Catena Bible (2 comments: Chrysostom 'no prophet saw, no example had')
Catena Bible (Haydock 'looked to reward in heaven')
Catena Bible (3 comments: Chrysostom defends Samson/Jephthah inclusion — 'did they not shine in Faith?')
crossrefs (7v→HEB.11.13, 6v→HEB.11.2 — inclusio with same verb emartyrēthēsan, 4v→1PE.1.12)
Catena Bible (Chrysostom 'before us in conflicts but NOT before us in crowns — ONE TIME OF CROWNING for ALL')

relevance_change.reason: Crucial bridge verse: closes the catalogue with inclusio (11:2↔11:39 same verb emartyrēthēsan). Chrysostom: 'before us in conflicts but NOT before us in crowns — ONE TIME OF CROWNING for ALL.' Explains WHY the cloud exists.

existing_refs_confirmed.justification: Crucial bridge verse: closes the catalogue with inclusio (11:2↔11:39 same verb). Chrysostom's 'waiting for us' theology explains WHY the cloud exists.

new_refs_added.justification: CHRISTOLOGICAL TELOS — without this verse the gold set stops at the 'cloud' (12:1) without reaching the GOAL (Jesus). Chrysostom: 'looking to Jesus = learning to run.' Calvin: 'Christ extends his hand.' JFB: 'distinct from ALL examples in Heb 11.' Topic FAITH: 'Author and Finisher'. Inseparable from 12:1.

The 'NOT YET' that explains WHY the cloud exists. 13v←HEB.11.1. 7v←HEB.11.39. Chrysostom: 'all virtue is to be a stranger in this world' + 'hints at something MYSTICAL: they received beforehand the resurrection.' Structural bridge: 11.1→11.13→11.39.

candidates_noted.justification: Lexical link: verb emartyrēthēsan (form of martyres=witnesses) DEFINES who composes the cloud. Inclusio with 11:39 (same verb). 6v←HEB.11.39.
13v→HEB.12.1. Same word hypomonē (perseverance). Theological launchpad for the entire Heb 11 catalogue.
Habakkuk 2:4 citation — 'the just shall live by faith' = THESIS of the entire chapter 11 catalogue.

cloud_interpretation_debate.Chrysostom: SHADE that relieves suffering — 'not lifted above us but COMPASSING us about' (greater security)
cloud_interpretation_debate.Calvin: TESTIMONIES (forensic sense) — 'not rivals but ASSOCIATES who applaud our victory'
cloud_interpretation_debate.Barnes: SPECTATORS (figurative) — 'we ought to act AS IF they saw us' (cautious: 'cannot be affirmed')
cloud_interpretation_debate.JFB: DUAL — (1) attest God's faithfulness, (2) witness our struggle (but second sense 'not directly sustained by Scripture')
cloud_interpretation_debate.Spurgeon: POSITIVE — 'the glorified spirits OBSERVE our conversation from yon blue heaven'

scholarly_notes.one_crowning_for_all: Chrysostom on 11:39-40: 'They were before us in conflicts but NOT before us in crowns. God appointed ONE TIME OF CROWNING FOR ALL.' Aquinas: 'The joy of each will be greater in the common joy of all.' This is the theological reason the cloud EXISTS.
scholarly_notes.rhetorical_structure: Heb 10:36→12:3 = 9-step structure: (1) Thesis Hab 2:4, (2) Definition 11:1, (3) Catalogue 11:4-31, (4) Summary 11:32-38, (5) Not Yet 11:39, (6) Reason 11:40, (7) Therefore 12:1, (8) Telos 12:2, (9) Application 12:3. Gold set covers steps 1,2,3(samples),5,7. Additions cover 8 (12:2) and bridge 11:13.
